hooks.prompt:
ztl-coder v3.0.0 loaded.

**Available Primary Agents:**
- ztl-coder-commander - Main orchestrator for complex tasks
- ztl-coder-brainstormer - Design exploration and refined requirements
- ztl-coder-octto - Browser-based interactive brainstorming with visual feedback

**Available Subagents:**
- planner - Create implementation plans
- executor - Orchestrate implement→review cycles
- implementer - Execute specific tasks
- reviewer - Code review
- codebase-locator - Find file locations
- codebase-analyzer - Deep module analysis
- pattern-finder - Find existing patterns
- project-initializer - Initialize project docs
- ledger-creator - Create continuity ledgers
- artifact-searcher - Search past work

**Commands:**
- /ztl-coder-init - Initialize project with ARCHITECTURE.md and CODE_STYLE.md
- /ztl-coder-ledger - Create/update continuity ledger
- /ztl-coder-search - Search past handoffs, plans, available ledgers
- /ztl-coder-review - Interactive code review with visual annotations
- /ztl-coder-annotate - Annotate any markdown file
- /ztl-coder-last - Annotate the last agent message

**MCP Tools:**
- ztl_code_look_at - View file structure
- ztl_code_artifact_search - Search artifacts
- ztl_code_ast_grep_search - AST-based code search
- ztl_code_ast_grep_replace - AST-based code replacement
- ztl_code_pty_* - PTY session management

**Workflow:** Brainstorm → Plan (visual review) → Implement → Review (visual annotations)

**Plan Review:** When exiting plan mode, a visual UI opens for inline annotations.
